title: 9L Collapsible Washing Up Bowl, Portable Wash Basin Silicone Plastic Basket Multipurpose Outdoor Travel Basin Camping Sink, Space Saving Folding Washtub
features: 【Premium Material】The collapsible basin is made of thick pp material and silicone material, BPA-free. Soft silicone material, can be folded repeatedly without deformation. Strong and durable, long service life, comfortable feel. The silicone material is not easy to absorb dust and oil stains and is easier to clean.

【3 Different Size】There are 3different sizes to separate the uses. Can handle your daily needs and meet the multi-purpose needs of adults and children. The color-contrasting design has a stylish appearance, and it is stress-free to match with various decoration styles.

【Anti-Skid, Hanging Hole Design】 A plastic ring is added to the bottom of the water basin to provide better stability for the water basin. Putting items into the collapsible wash basin will not move randomly, effectively preventing slipping. In the handle part, the enlarged design is used to better move and move the dish tub. The top hanging hole design is convenient for hanging and draining, and it is not easy to leave water stains.

【Collapsible for Space Saving】The compact design of the collapsible tub can save space. Simply press the bottom and pull to pop it up when in use, and fold it down to a third of its original height for compact storage when not in use. After the collapsible dish tubs of three sizes are folded, the stackable storage height is only (1.5In), which saves 70% of the space when stored, and is easy to carry.

【Multifunctional Folding Basin】 The collapsible washing basin can be used in multiple scenarios, such as washing dishes, washing machine parts, washing mops, washbasins, washing clothes, soaking dirty clothes, and can even be used for refrigerating wine. Putting the collapsible wash basin into the sink to wash dishes and clothes can effectively save water and improve work efficiency. Great for home, camping, cookout or RV.
description: Product Description Reinforced Material The collapsible basin is crafted from thick PP material and silicone, ensuring it is free from BPA. The silicone material is flexible, allowing for repeated folding without deformation. It is sturdy, durable, and boasts a long lifespan while providing a comfortable grip. The silicone material's non-porous nature resists dust and oil stains, making it easier to clean. Collapsible Wash Basin/Save Space The collapsible wash basin features a foldable design, available in three sizes - large, medium, and small - all capable of being compressed to a height of just 1.5 inches. The compact design of the collapsible bucket allows for efficient space-saving. Hooks/Anti-slip Design A plastic ring has been added to the bottom of the collapsible dish tub, providing enhanced stability to the collapsible wash basin. This ensures that items placed within the foldable sink remain in place and prevents accidental sliding. Additionally, a top-mounted hanging hole design allows for convenient storage by hanging and efficient drainage, reduce the residue of dirty water. Widened Edge, Easy to Hold Widened edge, very easy to hold. Highly versatile, it's perfect for freezing beverages, cleaning tubs in homes or cars, washing dishes or hands, and outdoor activities such as camping, barbecues, and campsite cleaning. Our collapsible bucket features a thermoplastic rubber (TPR) construction that is free from BPA. Collapsible for space-saving, the three-piece set folds down to a height of only 1.5 inches, allowing for over 80% space savings during storage. Highly versatile, it's perfect for freezing beverages, cleaning tubs in homes or cars, washing dishes or hands, and outdoor activities such as camping, barbecues, and campsite cleaning. Multi-purpose Collapsible Basin Multifunctional Folding Basin. The collapsible bucket can be used across various scenarios, such as washing dishes, washing machine parts, mopping, washing face masks, doing laundry, soaking dirty clothes, and it can even double as a wine cooler. Place the collapsible wash basin in the sink for dishwashing or laundry. It's incredibly suitable for home use, camping, picnics, or even in RVs. Versatility and tremendous value. Anti-skid, hanging hole design. Save Space The compact design of the collapsible tub can save space. Simply press the bottom and pull to pop it up when in use, and fold it down to a third of its original height for compact storage when not in use. After the collapsible dish tubs of three sizes are folded, the stackable storage height is only (1.5In), which saves 70% of the space when stored, and is easy to carry. 3 Different Size, Meet Different Needs There are three different sizes to separate the uses. 9 L size: 38.5 x 28.5 x 16.5(H) cm 5L size: 32 x 22 x 12 (H) cm 3.5L size: 26 x 17x 9 (H) cm Folds down to a height of only 1.5 inches.
